component.name: LGL DNF Helper
component.summary: Qt6 GUI for inspecting RPM packages and DNF5 dependencies

description.p: LGL DNF Helper is a graphical utility for understanding installed RPM packages on Fedora systems using DNF5 and RPM metadata.

Search for a package, command, capability, partial package name, or file path, then inspect what the package requires, what requires it, which files it owns, which config may matter, and where it came from.
The first version is read-only and does not run the GUI as root. If DNF5 is not installed, the application opens in setup mode with installation guidance.
Bug fix release: resolved repoquery timeouts, corrected Required By tab data, fixed versioned shared library file classification, and minor code quality improvements.
First minor release of the read-only DNF/RPM package inspection workflow.
Improved reset behavior, search result grouping, fuzzy package matching, package descriptions, config discovery, and error reporting.
